description: UC-10 conversational build (fixed NL prompt): 'Run three review jobs from ABC.md, DEF.md, GHI.md on this repo, pool 2, as subagents.' The host agent comprehends the NL (agent-self-reported) and assembles THIS shorthand; the builder expands it to the canonical plan (disk-graded against uc10_expected_plan.json) and the saved bundle re-runs faithfully.

jobs.prompt: (the contents of ABC.md) Review this repository per ABC.md and summarize findings.
(the contents of DEF.md) Review this repository per DEF.md and summarize findings.
(the contents of GHI.md) Review this repository per GHI.md and summarize findings.
